report_title: FloatChat-AI — MCP Tools & RAG Pipeline Final Review

e2e_rag_pipeline_tests.status: BLOCKED — LLM OOM (system has 2.1 GiB free, model needs 4.6 GiB)
e2e_rag_pipeline_tests.failure_reason: All failures are hardware OOM — NOT tool or pipeline bugs
e2e_rag_pipeline_tests.note: Run manually with: python tests/test_e2e_advanced.py (requires ~5GB free RAM for llama3:8b)

queries_prepared.query: Hello! What is the Argo program?
queries_prepared.description: Greeting + general science — should NOT call any tool

queries_prepared.query: What is a BGC float and what parameters does it measure?
How many floats and profiles are in the database?
Show me the most recent profiles in the database
What are the latest BGC profiles available?
Tell me everything about float 2902198
List all profile IDs for float 1900121
Get the full temperature and salinity profile for profile 1900121_001
queries_prepared.description: Full measurement data — must return ALL levels

queries_prepared.query: Show me the quality-controlled adjusted measurements for profile 1900121_005
queries_prepared.description: Adjusted data — use_adjusted must be true

queries_prepared.query: What dissolved oxygen data does BGC profile 2900765_001_BGC have?
queries_prepared.description: BGC profile DOXY data — correct _BGC suffix handling

queries_prepared.query: Find floats operating near the coast of India at 15°N, 80°E
queries_prepared.description: Geospatial search — must use lat/lon correctly

queries_prepared.query: What floats are within 300km of the equator at 75°E in the Indian Ocean?
Find profiles in the Arabian Sea
queries_prepared.description: Natural language search — uses ChromaDB embeddings

queries_prepared.query: Find BGC profiles that measure chlorophyll-a
Search for profiles related to dissolved oxygen in the deep ocean
queries_prepared.description: Could use either search tool — DOXY keyword

queries_prepared.query: What is the average temperature between 0 and 200 meters depth?
Give me salinity statistics for the upper 500 meters
Calculate summary statistics for profile 1900121_001 temperature and salinity
Find profiles with anomalous temperature values in the surface layer (0-100m)
Find profiles that reach depths deeper than 1800 meters
Are there any profiles with significant missing dissolved oxygen data?
What is the vertical temperature gradient in profile 1900121_001? Where is the thermocline?
Show me the trajectory of float 2902198 on a map
queries_prepared.description: Trajectory map — must produce chart image

queries_prepared.query: Plot the temperature depth profile for 1900121_001
Create a depth plot showing both temperature and salinity for profile 1900121_005
Generate a T-S diagram for profile 1900121_001
Create a T-S diagram comparing profiles 1900121_001, 1900121_010, and 1900121_020
queries_prepared.description: Multi-profile T-S diagram — water mass comparison

queries_prepared.query: Compare the temperature profiles of 1900121_001 and 1900121_050 on the same depth chart
Show me where profiles 1900121_001, 1900121_010, 1900121_020 are on a map
Plot the temperature changes over time for float 1900121 at 10 meters depth
queries_prepared.description: Temporal evolution of temp at fixed depth

queries_prepared.query: Show the depth distribution histogram for all profiles
Create a float density map showing where floats are concentrated
Show the distribution of dissolved oxygen values between 0 and 200 meters across all BGC profiles
Create a geographic heatmap of average temperature in the top 50 meters at 5 degree resolution
How many profiles does float 1900121 have?
queries_prepared.description: May need get_float_info or get_float_profiles to count

queries_prepared.query: What kind of visualization should I use for comparing salinity across different floats?

bugs_fixed.bug: _build_date_filter used datetime objects but MongoDB stores timestamps as ISO strings
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced _parse_date with _normalize_date_str — uses ISO string comparison

bugs_fixed.bug: get_recent_profiles sort fallback used datetime.min (type mismatch)
bugs_fixed.impact: Sort crash when timestamp is None

bugs_fixed.bug: LLM had no discovery-first guidance, would guess platform numbers
bugs_fixed.impact: LLM loops endlessly guessing invalid IDs
bugs_fixed.fix: Added DISCOVERY FIRST workflow to system prompt
